questions.question: Describe the function of a transport-layer protocol in relation to the OSI model. What is the main difference between a connection-oriented and connectionless transport-layer protocol?

A transport-layer protocol is required for communication between two devices on the internet. What are the two main types of transport-layer protocols: (i) connection-oriented and (ii) connectionless? Provide an example of each.

What are the key characteristics of a transport-layer protocol that ensure reliable data transfer between devices? (i) Error-checking mechanisms and (ii) Flow control. Explain how these mechanisms work together to ensure reliable data transfer.
